title: Converting GraphQL Schemas to RESTful API Endpoints with Authentication
scenario: A user wants to convert a complex GraphQL schema into equivalent RESTful API endpoints with authentication. The RESTful API endpoints must be readable, maintainable, and efficient. The user needs help on how to define the API endpoints and handle authentication such as JWT tokens. The target RESTful API endpoints must be accurate and well-documented.
constraints: Must use the latest RESTful API syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the conversion process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the GraphQL schema to RESTful API conversion
The readability and maintainability of the RESTful API endpoints
The accuracy and correctness of the authentication mechanism used
The quality and clarity of the documentation provided
